- frontend-design:frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

387	// ---------- update ----------
388	
389	func (m tuiModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
390		switch msg := msg.(type) {
391		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
392			m.width = msg.Width
393			m.height = msg.Height
394			return m, nil
395	
396		case spinner.TickMsg:
397			var cmd tea.Cmd
398			m.spinner, cmd = m.spinner.Update(msg)
399			return m, cmd
400	
401		case sandboxesLoadedMsg:
402			m.loading = false
403			if msg.err != nil {
404				m.feedback = msg.err.Error()
405				m.feedErr = true
406				return m, nil
407			}
408			m.sandboxes = msg.sandboxes
409			if m.cursor >= len(m.sandboxes) {
410				m.cursor = max(0, len(m.sandboxes)-1)
411			}
412			return m, nil
413	
414		case snapshotsLoadedMsg:
415			if msg.err == nil {
416				m.snapshots = msg.snapshots
417			}
418			return m, nil
419	
420		case routesLoadedMsg:
421			m.loading = false
422			if msg.err != nil {
423				m.feedback = msg.err.Error()
424				m.feedErr = true
425				m.view = viewSandboxes
426				return m, nil
427			}
428			m.routes = msg.routes
429			m.routeCursor = 0
430			return m, nil
431	
432		case deviceCodeMsg:
433			if msg.err != nil {
434				m.feedback = msg.err.Error()
435				m.feedErr = true
436				m.view = viewAddServer
437				return m, nil
438			}
439			m.loginDeviceCode = msg.code
440			m.loginUserCode = msg.code.UserCode
441			m.loginVerifyURL = msg.code.VerificationURL
442			m.loginPolling = true
443			m.view = viewServerLogin
444			// Try to open browser
445			_ = tuiOpenBrowser(msg.code.VerificationURL)
446			return m, pollDeviceToken(m.loginClient, msg.code.DeviceCode)
447	
448		case deviceTokenMsg:
449			if msg.err != nil {
450				m.feedback = msg.err.Error()
451				m.feedErr = true
452				m.loginPolling = false
453				m.view = viewServers
454				return m, nil
455			}
456			if msg.pending {
457				// Keep polling
458				return m, pollDeviceToken(m.loginClient, m.loginDeviceCode.DeviceCode)
459			}
460			// Success — save token and switch to the new server
461			cfg, err := config.Load()
462			if err != nil {
463				m.feedback = err.Error()
464				m.feedErr = true
465			} else {
466				cfg.SetServer(m.loginAlias, m.loginURL, msg.token, m.loginInsecure)
467				if err := config.Save(cfg); err != nil {
468					m.feedback = err.Error()
469					m.feedErr = true
470				} else {
471					m.feedback = fmt.Sprintf("Logged in to %s", m.loginAlias)
472					m.feedErr = false
473					// Recreate client for the new server
474					newClient, clientErr := api.NewClient()
475					if clientErr == nil {
476						m.client = newClient
477					}
478				}
479			}
480			m.loginPolling = false
481			m.view = viewServers
482			m.servers = loadServerList()
483			return m, nil
484	
485		case actionDoneMsg:
486			m.loading = false
487			if msg.err != nil {
488				m.feedback = msg.err.Error()
489				m.feedErr = true
490			} else {
491				m.feedback = msg.msg
492				m.feedErr = false
493			}
494			if m.view == viewConfirmDelete {
495				m.view = viewSandboxes
496			}
497			// Reload context-appropriate data
498			m.loading = true
499			if m.view == viewRoutes && m.routeSandbox != nil {
500				return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, loadRoutes(m.client, m.routeSandbox.ID))
501			}
502			return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, loadSandboxes(m.client))
503		}
504	
505		switch m.view {
506		case viewSandboxes:
507			return m.updateSandboxes(msg)
508		case viewRoutes:
509			return m.updateRoutes(msg)
510		case viewCreateSandbox:
511			return m.updateCreate(msg)
512		case viewCreateProject:
513			return m.updateCreateProject(msg)
514		case viewAddRoute:
515			return m.updateAddRoute(msg)
516		case viewConfirmDelete:
517			return m.updateConfirmDelete(msg)
518		case viewServers:
519			return m.updateServers(msg)
520		case viewAddServer:
521			return m.updateAddServer(msg)
522		case viewServerLogin:
523			return m.updateServerLogin(msg)
524		case viewConfirmRemoveServer:
525			return m.updateConfirmRemoveServer(msg)
526		case viewSettings:
527			return m.updateSettings(msg)
528		}
529		return m, nil
530	}
531	
532	func (m tuiModel) updateSandboxes(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
533		switch msg := msg.(type) {
534		case tea.KeyMsg:
535			m.feedback = ""
536			switch {
537			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("q", "ctrl+c"))):
538				return m, tea.Quit
539			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("up", "k"))):
540				if m.cursor > 0 {
541					m.cursor--
542				}
543			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("down", "j"))):
544				if m.cursor < len(m.sandboxes)-1 {
545					m.cursor++
546				}
547			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("c"))):
548				m.view = viewCreateSandbox
549				m.createFields = buildCreateFields()
550				m.createCursor = 0
551				m.createFields[0].input.Focus()
552				cmds := []tea.Cmd{m.createFields[0].input.Cursor.BlinkCmd()}
553				if len(m.snapshots) == 0 {
554					cmds = append(cmds, loadSnapshots(m.client))
555				}
556				return m, tea.Batch(cmds...)
557			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("g"))):
558				m.view = viewCreateProject
559				m.projectFields = buildProjectFields()
560				m.projectCursor = 0
561				m.projectFields[0].input.Focus()
562				return m, m.projectFields[0].input.Cursor.BlinkCmd()
563			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("r"))):
564				if len(m.sandboxes) > 0 {
565					m.loading = true
566					m.feedback = ""
567					sb := m.sandboxes[m.cursor]
568					m.routeSandbox = &sb
569					m.view = viewRoutes
570					return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, loadRoutes(m.client, sb.ID))
571				}
572			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("R"))):
573				m.loading = true
574				m.feedback = ""
575				return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, loadSandboxes(m.client))
576			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("S"))):
577				m.servers = loadServerList()
578				m.serverCursor = 0
579				// Position cursor on active server
580				for i, s := range m.servers {
581					if s.active {
582						m.serverCursor = i
583						break
584					}
585				}
586				m.view = viewServers
587				m.feedback = ""
588				return m, nil
589			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("P"))):
590				m.settingsFields = buildSettingsFields()
591				m.settingsCursor = 0
592				m.view = viewSettings
593				m.feedback = ""
594				return m, nil
595			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("s"))):
596				if len(m.sandboxes) > 0 {
597					sb := m.sandboxes[m.cursor]
598					if sb.Status == "stopped" {
599						m.loading = true
600						return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, doAction(func() (string, error) {
601							_, err := m.client.StartSandbox(sb.ID)
602							return fmt.Sprintf("%q started", sb.DisplayName()), err
603						}))
604					}
605				}
606			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("x"))):
607				if len(m.sandboxes) > 0 {
608					sb := m.sandboxes[m.cursor]
609					if sb.Status == "running" {
610						m.loading = true
611						return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, doAction(func() (string, error) {
612							_, err := m.client.StopSandbox(sb.ID)
613							return fmt.Sprintf("%q stopped", sb.DisplayName()), err
614						}))
615					}
616				}
617			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("d"))):
618				if len(m.sandboxes) > 0 {
619					sb := m.sandboxes[m.cursor]
620					m.deleteTarget = sb.Name
621					m.deleteID = sb.ID
622					m.view = viewConfirmDelete
623				}
624			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("enter"))):
625				// connect — exit TUI, then reconnect via the CLI connect command
626				if len(m.sandboxes) > 0 {
627					sb := m.sandboxes[m.cursor]
628					exe, _ := os.Executable()
629					c := exec.Command(exe, "connect", sb.Name)
630					c.Stdin = os.Stdin
631					c.Stdout = os.Stdout
632					c.Stderr = os.Stderr
633					return m, tea.ExecProcess(c, func(err error) tea.Msg {
634						return actionDoneMsg{"", err}
635					})
636				}
637			}
638		}
639		return m, nil
640	}

642	func (m tuiModel) updateRoutes(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
643		switch msg := msg.(type) {
644		case tea.KeyMsg:
645			m.feedback = ""
646			switch {
647			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("q", "esc"))):
648				m.view = viewSandboxes
649				m.routes = nil
650				m.routeSandbox = nil
651			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("ctrl+c"))):
652				return m, tea.Quit
653			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("up", "k"))):
654				if m.routeCursor > 0 {
655					m.routeCursor--
656				}
657			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("down", "j"))):
658				if m.routeCursor < len(m.routes)-1 {
659					m.routeCursor++
660				}
661			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("a"))):
662				m.view = viewAddRoute
663				m.routeFocusIdx = 0
664				m.routeInputs[0].SetValue("")
665				m.routeInputs[1].SetValue("")
666				m.routeInputs[0].Focus()
667				m.routeInputs[1].Blur()
668				return m, m.routeInputs[0].Cursor.BlinkCmd()
669			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("d"))):
670				if len(m.routes) > 0 {
671					r := m.routes[m.routeCursor]
672					sbID := m.routeSandbox.ID
673					m.loading = true
674					return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, doAction(func() (string, error) {
675						err := m.client.RemoveRouteByID(sbID, r.ID)
676						return fmt.Sprintf("Route #%d removed", r.ID), err
677					}))
678				}
679			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("R"))):
680				if m.routeSandbox != nil {
681					m.loading = true
682					return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, loadRoutes(m.client, m.routeSandbox.ID))
683				}
684			}
685		}
686		return m, nil
687	}

704	func (m tuiModel) updateCreate(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
705		f := &m.createFields[m.createCursor]
706	
707		switch msg := msg.(type) {
708		case tea.KeyMsg:
709			switch msg.Type {
710			case tea.KeyEsc:
711				m.view = viewSandboxes
712				m.feedback = ""
713				return m, nil
714			case tea.KeyCtrlC:
715				return m, tea.Quit
716			case tea.KeyUp:
717				if m.createCursor > 0 {
718					return m.createFocusField(m.createCursor - 1)
719				}
720				return m, nil
721			case tea.KeyDown, tea.KeyTab:
722				if m.createCursor < len(m.createFields)-1 {
723					return m.createFocusField(m.createCursor + 1)
724				}
725				return m, nil
726			case tea.KeyShiftTab:
727				if m.createCursor > 0 {
728					return m.createFocusField(m.createCursor - 1)
729				}
730				return m, nil
731			case tea.KeyEnter:
732				if f.kind == fieldBool {
733					// Toggle on enter too
734					f.boolVal = !f.boolVal
735					return m, nil
736				}
737				// Submit the form if on last field or ctrl+enter intent
738				return m.submitCreateForm()
739			case tea.KeyCtrlS:
740				return m.submitCreateForm()
741			}
742	
743			// Space toggles booleans
744			if f.kind == fieldBool && msg.String() == " " {
745				f.boolVal = !f.boolVal
746				return m, nil
747			}
748	
749			// Tab-completion for snapshot field
750			if m.createCursor == cfSnapshot && f.kind == fieldText && msg.String() == "right" {
751				m = m.completeSnapshot()
752				return m, nil
753			}
754		}
755	
756		// Forward to text input if current field is text
757		if f.kind == fieldText {
758			var cmd tea.Cmd
759			f.input, cmd = f.input.Update(msg)
760			return m, cmd
761		}
762		return m, nil
763	}

765	func (m tuiModel) completeSnapshot() tuiModel {
766		if len(m.snapshots) == 0 {
767			return m
768		}
769		current := strings.ToLower(m.createFields[cfSnapshot].input.Value())
770		for _, snap := range m.snapshots {
771			if current == "" || strings.HasPrefix(strings.ToLower(snap.Name), current) {
772				m.createFields[cfSnapshot].input.SetValue(snap.Name)
773				m.createFields[cfSnapshot].input.CursorEnd()
774				break
775			}
776		}
777		return m
778	}

928	func (m tuiModel) updateAddRoute(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
929		switch msg := msg.(type) {
930		case tea.KeyMsg:
931			switch msg.Type {
932			case tea.KeyEsc:
933				m.view = viewRoutes
934				return m, nil
935			case tea.KeyCtrlC:
936				return m, tea.Quit
937			case tea.KeyTab, tea.KeyShiftTab:
938				m.routeFocusIdx = (m.routeFocusIdx + 1) % 2
939				for i := range m.routeInputs {
940					if i == m.routeFocusIdx {
941						m.routeInputs[i].Focus()
942					} else {
943						m.routeInputs[i].Blur()
944					}
945				}
946				return m, m.routeInputs[m.routeFocusIdx].Cursor.BlinkCmd()
947			case tea.KeyEnter:
948				domain := strings.TrimSpace(m.routeInputs[0].Value())
949				portStr := strings.TrimSpace(m.routeInputs[1].Value())
950				if domain == "" {
951					m.feedback = "domain is required"
952					m.feedErr = true
953					return m, nil
954				}
955				port := 8080
956				if portStr != "" {
957					n := 0
958					for _, ch := range portStr {
959						if ch < '0' || ch > '9' {
960							m.feedback = "invalid port"
961							m.feedErr = true
962							return m, nil
963						}
964						n = n*10 + int(ch-'0')
965					}
966					port = n
967				}
968				sbID := m.routeSandbox.ID
969				m.view = viewRoutes
970				m.loading = true
971				return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, doAction(func() (string, error) {
972					r, err := m.client.AddRoute(sbID, api.RouteRequest{
973						Domain: domain,
974						Port:   port,
975						Mode:   "http",
976					})
977					if err != nil {
978						return "", err
979					}
980					return fmt.Sprintf("Route added: %s → :%d", r.Domain, r.Port), nil
981				}))
982			}
983		}
984	
985		var cmd tea.Cmd
986		m.routeInputs[m.routeFocusIdx], cmd = m.routeInputs[m.routeFocusIdx].Update(msg)
987		return m, cmd
988	}

1061	func (m tuiModel) viewSandboxes(b *strings.Builder) {
1062		if m.loading && len(m.sandboxes) == 0 {
1063			b.WriteString("  " + m.spinner.View() + " Loading sandboxes...\n")
1064			b.WriteString("\n" + helpStyle.Render("  q quit"))
1065			return
1066		}
1067	
1068		if len(m.sandboxes) == 0 {
1069			b.WriteString("  No sandboxes. Press c to create one.\n")
1070		} else {
1071			// Header
1072			b.WriteString(headerStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf("  %-22s %-10s %-18s %s", "NAME", "STATUS", "CREATED", "ROUTE")) + "\n")
1073	
1074			for i, sb := range m.sandboxes {
1075				name := sb.DisplayName()
1076				if sb.Temporary {
1077					name += " ~"
1078				}
1079				if len(name) > 22 {
1080					name = name[:21] + "…"
1081				}
1082	
1083				st := statusStopped.Render(sb.Status)
1084				if sb.Status == "running" {
1085					st = statusRunning.Render(sb.Status)
1086				}
1087	
1088				created := sb.CreatedAt.Local().Format("Jan 02 15:04")
1089	
1090				route := ""
1091				if len(sb.Routes) > 0 {
1092					parts := make([]string, 0, len(sb.Routes))
1093					for _, r := range sb.Routes {
1094						if r.Mode == "tcp" {
1095							parts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf("tcp/:%d", r.PublicPort))
1096						} else {
1097							parts = append(parts, r.Domain)
1098						}
1099					}
1100					route = strings.Join(parts, ", ")
1101					if len(route) > 30 {
1102						route = route[:29] + "…"
1103					}
1104				}
1105	
1106				line := fmt.Sprintf("  %-22s %-10s %-18s %s", name, st, created, route)
1107				if i == m.cursor {
1108					// Re-render with selection styling — pad to width
1109					padded := fmt.Sprintf("  %-22s %-20s %-18s %-30s", name, sb.Status, created, route)
1110					line = selectedStyle.Render(padded)
1111				}
1112				b.WriteString(line + "\n")
1113			}
1114		}
1115	
1116		if m.loading {
1117			b.WriteString("\n  " + m.spinner.View() + "\n")
1118		}
1119	
1120		b.WriteString("\n")
1121		b.WriteString(helpStyle.Render("  enter connect  c create sandbox  g create project  s start  x stop  d destroy  r routes  S servers  P prefs  R refresh  q quit"))
1122		b.WriteString("\n")
1123	}

1275	func loadServerList() []serverEntry {
1276		cfg, err := config.Load()
1277		if err != nil {
1278			return nil
1279		}
1280		aliases := make([]string, 0, len(cfg.Servers))
1281		for alias := range cfg.Servers {
1282			aliases = append(aliases, alias)
1283		}
1284		sort.Strings(aliases)
1285	
1286		entries := make([]serverEntry, 0, len(aliases))
1287		for _, alias := range aliases {
1288			srv := cfg.Servers[alias]
1289			entries = append(entries, serverEntry{
1290				alias:    alias,
1291				url:      srv.URL,
1292				active:   alias == cfg.CurrentServer,
1293				hasToken: srv.Token != "",
1294			})
1295		}
1296		return entries
1297	}

1299	func tuiDeriveAlias(serverURL string) string {
1300		u, err := url.Parse(serverURL)
1301		if err != nil {
1302			return "default"
1303		}
1304		host := u.Hostname()
1305		if host == "localhost" || host == "127.0.0.1" {
1306			return "local"
1307		}
1308		if net.ParseIP(host) != nil {
1309			return host
1310		}
1311		parts := strings.Split(host, ".")
1312		if len(parts) > 0 {
1313			return parts[0]
1314		}
1315		return "default"
1316	}

1331	func (m tuiModel) updateServers(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
1332		switch msg := msg.(type) {
1333		case tea.KeyMsg:
1334			m.feedback = ""
1335			switch {
1336			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("q", "esc"))):
1337				m.view = viewSandboxes
1338				// Reload sandboxes in case server changed
1339				m.loading = true
1340				return m, tea.Batch(m.spinner.Tick, loadSandboxes(m.client))
1341			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("ctrl+c"))):
1342				return m, tea.Quit
1343			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("up", "k"))):
1344				if m.serverCursor > 0 {
1345					m.serverCursor--
1346				}
1347			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("down", "j"))):
1348				if m.serverCursor < len(m.servers)-1 {
1349					m.serverCursor++
1350				}
1351			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("enter"))):
1352				// Switch to selected server
1353				if len(m.servers) > 0 {
1354					s := m.servers[m.serverCursor]
1355					cfg, err := config.Load()
1356					if err != nil {
1357						m.feedback = err.Error()
1358						m.feedErr = true
1359						return m, nil
1360					}
1361					cfg.CurrentServer = s.alias
1362					if err := config.Save(cfg); err != nil {
1363						m.feedback = err.Error()
1364						m.feedErr = true
1365						return m, nil
1366					}
1367					// Recreate client
1368					newClient, clientErr := api.NewClient()
1369					if clientErr != nil {
1370						m.feedback = clientErr.Error()
1371						m.feedErr = true
1372						return m, nil
1373					}
1374					m.client = newClient
1375					m.servers = loadServerList()
1376					m.feedback = fmt.Sprintf("Switched to %s", s.alias)
1377					m.feedErr = false
1378				}
1379			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("a"))):
1380				// Add server
1381				m.view = viewAddServer
1382				m.addServerFocus = 0
1383				m.addServerInsecure = false
1384				urlInput := makeTextInput("https://sandcastle.example.com", 50)
1385				aliasInput := makeTextInput("auto-derived from URL", 30)
1386				urlInput.Focus()
1387				m.addServerInputs = [2]textinput.Model{urlInput, aliasInput}
1388				return m, urlInput.Cursor.BlinkCmd()
1389			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("d"))):
1390				// Remove server
1391				if len(m.servers) > 0 {
1392					m.removeServerAlias = m.servers[m.serverCursor].alias
1393					m.view = viewConfirmRemoveServer
1394				}
1395			}
1396		}
1397		return m, nil
1398	}

1400	func (m tuiModel) updateAddServer(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
1401		switch msg := msg.(type) {
1402		case tea.KeyMsg:
1403			switch msg.Type {
1404			case tea.KeyEsc:
1405				m.view = viewServers
1406				m.feedback = ""
1407				return m, nil
1408			case tea.KeyCtrlC:
1409				return m, tea.Quit
1410			case tea.KeyTab, tea.KeyDown:
1411				if m.addServerFocus < 2 {
1412					m.addServerFocus++
1413				}
1414				if m.addServerFocus < 2 {
1415					m.addServerInputs[0].Blur()
1416					m.addServerInputs[1].Blur()
1417					m.addServerInputs[m.addServerFocus].Focus()
1418					return m, m.addServerInputs[m.addServerFocus].Cursor.BlinkCmd()
1419				}
1420				// Focus is on insecure toggle — blur text inputs
1421				m.addServerInputs[0].Blur()
1422				m.addServerInputs[1].Blur()
1423				return m, nil
1424			case tea.KeyShiftTab, tea.KeyUp:
1425				if m.addServerFocus > 0 {
1426					m.addServerFocus--
1427				}
1428				if m.addServerFocus < 2 {
1429					m.addServerInputs[0].Blur()
1430					m.addServerInputs[1].Blur()
1431					m.addServerInputs[m.addServerFocus].Focus()
1432					return m, m.addServerInputs[m.addServerFocus].Cursor.BlinkCmd()
1433				}
1434				return m, nil
1435			case tea.KeyEnter:
1436				if m.addServerFocus == 2 {
1437					// Toggle insecure
1438					m.addServerInsecure = !m.addServerInsecure
1439					return m, nil
1440				}
1441				// Submit
1442				return m.submitAddServer()
1443			case tea.KeyCtrlS:
1444				return m.submitAddServer()
1445			}
1446	
1447			// Space on insecure toggle
1448			if m.addServerFocus == 2 && msg.String() == " " {
1449				m.addServerInsecure = !m.addServerInsecure
1450				return m, nil
1451			}
1452		}
1453	
1454		if m.addServerFocus < 2 {
1455			var cmd tea.Cmd
1456			m.addServerInputs[m.addServerFocus], cmd = m.addServerInputs[m.addServerFocus].Update(msg)
1457			return m, cmd
1458		}
1459		return m, nil
1460	}

1466			m.feedErr = true
1467			return m, nil

1469		serverURL = strings.TrimRight(serverURL, "/")
1470	
1471		alias := strings.TrimSpace(m.addServerInputs[1].Value())

1477		m.loginURL = serverURL
1478		m.loginInsecure = m.addServerInsecure

1480		m.view = viewServerLogin
1481		m.loginPolling = false

1483		m.loginVerifyURL = ""

1504	func (m tuiModel) updateConfirmRemoveServer(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
1505		switch msg := msg.(type) {
1506		case tea.KeyMsg:
1507			switch {
1508			case key.Matches(msg, key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("y", "Y"))):
1509				alias := m.removeServerAlias
1510				cfg, err := config.Load()
1511				if err != nil {
1512					m.feedback = err.Error()
1513					m.feedErr = true
1514					m.view = viewServers
1515					return m, nil
1516				}
1517				delete(cfg.Servers, alias)
1518				if cfg.CurrentServer == alias {
1519					cfg.CurrentServer = ""
1520					for a := range cfg.Servers {
1521						cfg.CurrentServer = a
1522						break
1523					}
1524				}
1525				if err := config.Save(cfg); err != nil {
1526					m.feedback = err.Error()
1527					m.feedErr = true
1528				} else {
1529					m.feedback = fmt.Sprintf("Removed %s", alias)
1530					m.feedErr = false
1531					// Recreate client if server changed
1532					if newClient, err := api.NewClient(); err == nil {
1533						m.client = newClient
1534					}
1535				}
1536				m.servers = loadServerList()
1537				if m.serverCursor >= len(m.servers) {
1538					m.serverCursor = max(0, len(m.servers)-1)
1539				}
1540				m.view = viewServers
1541				return m, nil
1542			default:
1543				m.view = viewServers
1544				m.feedback = "cancelled"
1545				m.feedErr = false
1546			}
1547		}
1548		return m, nil
1549	}

1682	func (m tuiModel) updateSettings(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
1683		f := &m.settingsFields[m.settingsCursor]
1684	
1685		switch msg := msg.(type) {
1686		case tea.KeyMsg:
1687			switch msg.Type {
1688			case tea.KeyEsc:
1689				m.view = viewSandboxes
1690				m.feedback = ""
1691				return m, nil
1692			case tea.KeyCtrlC:
1693				return m, tea.Quit
1694			case tea.KeyUp:
1695				if m.settingsCursor > 0 {
1696					return m.settingsFocusField(m.settingsCursor - 1)
1697				}
1698				return m, nil
1699			case tea.KeyDown, tea.KeyTab:
1700				if m.settingsCursor < len(m.settingsFields)-1 {
1701					return m.settingsFocusField(m.settingsCursor + 1)
1702				}
1703				return m, nil
1704			case tea.KeyShiftTab:
1705				if m.settingsCursor > 0 {
1706					return m.settingsFocusField(m.settingsCursor - 1)
1707				}
1708				return m, nil
1709			case tea.KeyEnter:
1710				if f.kind == fieldBool {
1711					f.boolVal = !f.boolVal
1712					return m, nil
1713				}
1714				if f.kind == fieldCycle {
1715					f.cycleIdx = (f.cycleIdx + 1) % len(f.cycleOptions)
1716					return m, nil
1717				}
1718				// On text field, save and exit
1719				return m.saveSettings()
1720			case tea.KeyCtrlS:
1721				return m.saveSettings()
1722			}
1723	
1724			// Space toggles booleans and cycles
1725			if msg.String() == " " {
1726				if f.kind == fieldBool {
1727					f.boolVal = !f.boolVal
1728					return m, nil
1729				}
1730				if f.kind == fieldCycle {
1731					f.cycleIdx = (f.cycleIdx + 1) % len(f.cycleOptions)
1732					return m, nil
1733				}
1734			}
1735	
1736			// Left/right for cycle fields
1737			if f.kind == fieldCycle {
1738				if msg.String() == "left" || msg.String() == "h" {
1739					f.cycleIdx = (f.cycleIdx - 1 + len(f.cycleOptions)) % len(f.cycleOptions)
1740					return m, nil
1741				}
1742				if msg.String() == "right" || msg.String() == "l" {
1743					f.cycleIdx = (f.cycleIdx + 1) % len(f.cycleOptions)
1744					return m, nil
1745				}
1746			}
1747		}
1748

package api

import "time"

type Sandbox struct {
	ID                     int            `json:"id"`
	Name                   string         `json:"name"`
	FullName               string         `json:"full_name"`
	Hostname               string         `json:"hostname,omitempty"`
	Status                 string         `json:"status"`
	Image                  string         `json:"image"`
	SSHPort                int            `json:"ssh_port,omitempty"`
	ProjectName            string         `json:"project_name,omitempty"`
	MountHome              bool           `json:"mount_home"`
	HomePath               string         `json:"home_path,omitempty"`
	DataPath               string         `json:"data_path,omitempty"`
	ProjectPath            string         `json:"project_path,omitempty"`
	StorageMode            string         `json:"storage_mode,omitempty"`
	Temporary              bool           `json:"temporary"`
	Tailscale              bool           `json:"tailscale"`
	TailscaleIP            string         `json:"tailscale_ip,omitempty"`
	VNCEnabled             bool           `json:"vnc_enabled"`
	VNCGeometry            string         `json:"vnc_geometry,omitempty"`
	VNCDepth               int            `json:"vnc_depth,omitempty"`
	DockerEnabled          bool           `json:"docker_enabled"`
	SMBEnabled             bool           `json:"smb_enabled"`
	OIDCEnabled            bool           `json:"oidc_enabled"`
	GCPOIDCEnabled         bool           `json:"gcp_oidc_enabled"`
	GCPOIDCConfigID        int            `json:"gcp_oidc_config_id,omitempty"`
	GCPOIDCConfig          *GcpOidcConfig `json:"gcp_oidc_config,omitempty"`
	GCPServiceAccountEmail string         `json:"gcp_service_account_email,omitempty"`
	GCPPrincipalScope      string         `json:"gcp_principal_scope,omitempty"`
	GCPRoles               []string       `json:"gcp_roles,omitempty"`
	GCPOIDCConfigured      bool           `json:"gcp_oidc_configured"`
	Routes                 []SandboxRoute `json:"routes"`
	ConnectCommand         string         `json:"connect_command"`
	ImageBuiltAt           *time.Time     `json:"image_built_at,omitempty"`
	CreatedAt              time.Time      `json:"created_at"`
	ArchivedAt             *time.Time     `json:"archived_at,omitempty"`
}

// DisplayName returns "<project>:<name>" when the sandbox is bound to a
// project, else just the sandbox name. Use this anywhere the sandbox is
// surfaced to a human; keep using Name for identity / API lookups.
func (s Sandbox) DisplayName() string {
	if s.ProjectName == "" {
		return s.Name
	}
	return s.ProjectName + ":" + s.Name
}

	ID         int    `json:"id"`
	Domain     string `json:"domain,omitempty"`
	Port       int    `json:"port"`
